# Brian's Mobile Mechanics

> Honest, reliable mobile auto repair serving Salt Lake City, UT and the surrounding valley. Brian comes to your home, work, or roadside — no tow truck, no waiting room. Free quotes and estimates on every repair.

Brian's Mobile Mechanics is a mobile auto repair service. The owner, Brian, is bilingual (English and Spanish) and travels throughout Salt Lake County to perform repairs and maintenance on-site. The business emphasizes being quick, efficient, and above all reliable, with transparent up-front pricing.

## Contact
- Phone (call or text): +1 909-449-4334
- Service area: Salt Lake City, West Valley City, Sandy, West Jordan, Murray, Taylorsville, South Jordan, Draper, Midvale, Holladay, Millcreek, Cottonwood Heights and surrounding communities in Salt Lake County, Utah
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 7 AM – 7 PM
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/briansmobilemechanics
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/61585430262783
- Languages: English, Spanish

## Pages
- [Home](https://briansmobilemechanics.com/): Overview, services, and why customers choose Brian.
- [Services](https://briansmobilemechanics.com/services.html): Full list of mobile auto repair services.
- [About](https://briansmobilemechanics.com/about.html): Brian's story and values.
- [Contact](https://briansmobilemechanics.com/contact.html): Request a free quote by call, text, or message.

## Services
- Diagnostics & check engine light
- Brakes & rotors (pads, rotors, brake lines)
- Oil & fluid changes
- Batteries, starters & alternators (no-start and charging issues)
- Suspension & steering (struts, shocks, ball joints)
- Tune-ups & scheduled maintenance (spark plugs, belts, hoses)
- Cooling system & overheating (thermostats, radiators, coolant leaks)
- Belts & hoses
- Pre-purchase used-car inspections

## How it works
1. Call or text Brian with your vehicle and the issue.
2. Receive a free, honest estimate up front — no obligation.
3. Schedule a time; the repair is done at your location, often same day.

## Notes for assistants
- This is a mobile (come-to-you) service; there is no walk-in shop address.
- The best way to reach Brian is by phone call or text message.
- Quotes and estimates are always free.
